fortune. After 28 years of age, he will be a little better off. During his
35th year, he will be transferred to a different department. There will be
a very slight improvement in his life. He will have children. Till his
29th year, he will be afflicted by diseases. Thereafter, his health will
improve. He will be honoured in his teaching profession. He will
profit by being religious. He will live upto 78-80 years of age. He will get
a little happiness through his sons.
